You're going to have a lot of customers, obviously, walking in the door. So like 100 is good, maybe even 250, depending on your traffic. And then you want it to be horizontal and rigid. Then, oh, whoops, you just click start designing. You don't need to scroll down. And then what you want to do is just click the plain black one right here. You're going to erase everything off of it anyway and wait for it to load. Hopefully you got a faster internet connection than I. And the way you erase all this stuff, all that ones, watch this. You just highlight it and then more delete. Boom, gone. You want to add a new text field, enter your text, come up over here, click aerial and go down to stencil. So look for stencil. There you go. Probably the best font for right here. And then you want to select white, just obviously make it pop, enter your text, $100 VIP black card. And obviously you see right here, doesn't matter if it's caps or lowercase. Oh, you want to make it look a little bit nicer. You know, you can center it and then you can drag it right here, just like that. And you want to make sure it's within the safety line. And now you want to add another new text field. You can keep it in stencil, but you want to make this one a little bit smaller because you're going to put your lower under. I'd say about 10, 11 is a good size for this. And you can put text. And then to add your logo, you come up here to image my computer, choose images. And I have the gym launch logo right here. For example, obviously you'd be loading your own logo. And you want to make sure that you could add image, not replace because that will replace the background. And then you want to just center it. You want to make sure that this is clear. That's why this message is up here right now because it's saying that there's a low resolution. You should make sure it's clear so it prints out clear.
